hafp_research_age_2_renaissance = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = renaissance_advance }
			OR = {
				"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" >= 2
				has_embraced_institution = institution:renaissance
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:renaissance_advance
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = patron_of_art }
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:patron_of_art
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = renaissance_sculptures }
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:renaissance_sculptures
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = renaissance_thought }
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:renaissance_thought
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = government_size_renaissance }
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:government_size_renaissance
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = chancery_records }
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:chancery_records
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = crown_power_advance_renaissance }
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:crown_power_advance_renaissance
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = renaissance_court }
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:renaissance_court
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = power_projection_advance_2 }
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:power_projection_advance_2
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = anatomy_advance }
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:anatomy_advance
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = vibrant_court_advance }
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:vibrant_court_advance
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = banking_advance }
			OR = {
				"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" >= 2
				has_embraced_institution = institution:banking
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:banking_advance
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = merchants_and_trade }
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:merchants_and_trade
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = standardized_coins }
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:standardized_coins
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = pop_promotion_speed_age_2 }
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:pop_promotion_speed_age_2
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = trade_range_advance_age_2 }
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:trade_range_advance_age_2
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = rudimentary_coastal_ship_repair }
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:rudimentary_coastal_ship_repair
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = maritime_advance_age_2 }
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:maritime_advance_age_2
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = diplomatic_range_age_1 }
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:diplomatic_range_age_1
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = spy_construction_renaissance }
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:spy_construction_renaissance
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = rebellion_support }
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:rebellion_support
	}
	if = {
		limit = {

	}

hafp_research_age_3_discovery = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = surgery_advance }
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:surgery_advance
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = new_world_advance }
			OR = {
				"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" >= 2
				has_embraced_institution = institution:new_world
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:new_world_advance
	}
	if = {
		limit = {

		research_advance = advance_type:mystai_advance

	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = bodaiji }
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:bodaiji
	}
}

hafp_research_age_4_reformation = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = pharmacology_advance }
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:pharmacology_advance
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = confessionalism_advance }
			OR = {
				"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" >= 2
				has_embraced_institution = institution:confessionalism
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:confessionalism_advance
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = gov_reform_reformation_a }
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:gov_reform_reformation_a

			NOT = { has_advance = confessional_court }

hafp_research_age_5_absolutism = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = sanitation_advance }
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:sanitation_advance
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = manufactories_advance }
			OR = {
				"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" >= 2
				has_embraced_institution = institution:manufactories
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:manufactories_advance
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = central_bank_advance }
			OR = {
				"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" >= 2
				has_embraced_institution = institution:banking
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:central_bank_advance
	}
	if = {

			NOT = { has_advance = lead_ore_dressing }
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:lead_ore_dressing
	}

			NOT = { has_advance = powerful_statues }
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:powerful_statues

hafp_research_age_6_revolutions = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = vaccination_advance }
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:vaccination_advance
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = enlightenment_advance }
			OR = {
				"variable_map(cmm|flag:hafp__research_scope)" >= 2
				has_embraced_institution = institution:enlightenment
			}
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:enlightenment_advance
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = artists_advance_revolutions }
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:artists_advance_revolutions
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = war_score_revolutions_advance }
		}
		research_advance = advance_type:war_score_revolutions_advance
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_advance = spy_construction_revolutions }

hafp_research_all = {
	hafp_research_age_1_traditions = yes
	hafp_research_age_2_renaissance = yes
	hafp_research_age_3_discovery = yes
	hafp_research_age_4_reformation = yes
	hafp_research_age_5_absolutism = yes
	hafp_research_age_6_revolutions = yes
}

hafp_research_current_era = {
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_1_traditions }
		hafp_research_age_1_traditions = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_2_renaissance }
		hafp_research_age_2_renaissance = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_3_discovery }
		hafp_research_age_3_discovery = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_4_reformation }
		hafp_research_age_4_reformation = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_5_absolutism }
		hafp_research_age_5_absolutism = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_6_revolutions }
		hafp_research_age_6_revolutions = yes
	}
}

hafp_research_previous_eras = {
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_2_renaissance }
		hafp_research_age_1_traditions = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_3_discovery }
		hafp_research_age_1_traditions = yes
		hafp_research_age_2_renaissance = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_4_reformation }
		hafp_research_age_1_traditions = yes
		hafp_research_age_2_renaissance = yes
		hafp_research_age_3_discovery = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_5_absolutism }
		hafp_research_age_1_traditions = yes
		hafp_research_age_2_renaissance = yes
		hafp_research_age_3_discovery = yes
		hafp_research_age_4_reformation = yes
	}
	if = {
		limit = { current_age = age_6_revolutions }
		hafp_research_age_1_traditions = yes
		hafp_research_age_2_renaissance = yes
		hafp_research_age_3_discovery = yes
		hafp_research_age_4_reformation = yes
		hafp_research_age_5_absolutism = yes
	}
}
